name: BOLLINGER INNOVATIONS, INC.
summary: Bollinger Innovations, Inc. (operating as Mullen Automotive Inc.) is a Southern California-based electric vehicle and energy technology company. It develops and sells electric vehicles including commercial vans and trucks, operates through subsidiaries including Ottava Automotive and Mullen Advanced Energy Operations, and holds a majority ownership in Bollinger Motors. The company is in early-stage production and has not yet manufactured or sold a significant number of vehicles.

products.name: Mullen Electric Commercial Vans
products.description: Electric commercial vans developed for fleet and commercial customers.

products.name: Bollinger Motors Vehicles
products.description: Electric vehicles produced under majority-owned Bollinger Motors subsidiary.

partnerships.description: Company relies on OEMs, suppliers, and service providers for parts and components.
